case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ATLAS AMBROSIO

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AMBROSIO, ATLAS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2014
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1) INTEREST 2) COSTS (CCP 1033) 3) ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAY-01-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMBROSIO, ATLAS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMBROSIO, ATLAS $1,902.40 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,186.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AMBROSIO, ATLAS
